templateMetadata.description: Personal pipeline view for sales reps: my deals, my targets, my priorities
templateMetadata.audience: Sales Reps, BDRs, AEs, Account Executives
templateMetadata.useCase: Daily deal management, prioritize activities, track personal performance

calculatedFieldsRequired.formula: IF(CloseDate < TODAY(), 'Overdue', IF(CloseDate <= TODAY() + 7, 'This Week', IF(CloseDate <= TODAY() + 30, 'This Month', IF(CloseDate <= End_of_Quarter__c, 'This Quarter', 'Later'))))
calculatedFieldsRequired.description: Categorize deals by close date proximity

steps: 2. Create all 6 source reports using templates
3. Add report filter: OwnerId = $User.Id (shows only logged-in user's records)
4. Create dashboard in Dashboards folder (My Dashboards)
7. Set refresh to real-time (if available) or hourly
8. Make dashboard personal (not shared) or share with all reps
9. Pin dashboard to Home Page for easy access
10. Set as default dashboard for sales reps

userExperienceTips.homePageLayout: Add this dashboard component to Sales App home page
userExperienceTips.mobileOptimization: Ensure components are mobile-responsive for on-the-go access
userExperienceTips.notifications: Enable Salesforce Mobile push notifications for overdue deals

morningRoutine.focus: Top priorities table, deals closing this month
questions: What deals am I working on today?
actions: Review next steps for top 5 deals
Schedule calls for deals closing this week
Follow up on stalled deals (no activity 3+ days)

questions: Am I on track to hit quota?
Where are my deals getting stuck?
actions: If too many early-stage deals, focus on moving deals forward
Update deal stages after customer calls

questions: Did I follow up on all commitments?
actions: Update opportunity records with latest info

coverageRatio.whyItMatters: Indicates whether you have enough pipeline to hit quota

daysToClose.benchmark: Focus on deals closing in next 30 days
daysToClose.whyItMatters: Helps prioritize which deals need immediate attention

dailyHabits: Check dashboard first thing in morning
Update deal stages after every customer interaction
Log all activities (calls, emails, meetings) in real-time
Review top priorities at end of day
pipelineHygiene: Close out old/dead deals (don't let them linger)
Keep close dates realistic (update if pushed)
Use Next Step field religiously (always know what's next)
Activity on every deal at least once per week
commonMistakes: ❌ Letting deals sit idle for 7+ days
❌ Not logging activities (makes pipeline look stale)
